comment: Policy for the current NA claim-set document (NA-2026-07-22-v4). §3 claims are the fragment corpus (class 'claims', parsed by lib.claims into limitation units). Guidance blocks designated 'quotable' serve as caution/gate sources and may be quoted in the UI; they never form a pane. Everything else is excluded. Quotability is profile-designated, never hardcoded (TDD §2).
